title: astelma modestum
intro: Astelma modestum, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Astelma modestum include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory diseases. Astelma modestum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular natural treatment option for many people.
